chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 343 of 2020 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders as to non-prosecution. 19.11.2025 Mr. Muhabbat Hussain Awan, advocate for the applicant. Matter is pending for orders as to non-prosecution since 2020. Counsel is not even aware of the objections raised. It appears that the applicant is not interested in the present proceedings. Accordingly, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, the reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
